# Research Brief

Claim under review: Fixture claim framing without factual findings.

## Supporting Evidence
- Supporting evidence: The audit reported a 12% decrease in processing time. [source: https://example.test/source-1]

## Opposing Evidence
- Opposing evidence: The evaluation reported higher administrative costs in the first year. [source: https://example.test/source-2]

## Limitations
- This source addresses a narrower version of the claim: Among surveyed schools, the pilot reported a 9% gain. [source: https://example.test/source-3]
